final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire valid,
    input wire [31:0] command_in,
    output reg [31:0] command_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            command_out <= 32'b0;
        end else if (valid) begin
            command_out <= command_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
